name: Tv Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, then stir in the vanilla.
3. Mix in the sifted flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in the quick oatmeal, Rice Krispies, coconut, and nuts.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees until golden brown.
